title: The Straw Hat Grand Fleet Is Born — Part 2
description: Luffy rejects command but accepts friendship, and the fleet forms itself around his freedom.
scene: On pages 7–11, Luffy, Bartolomeo, Sai, Leo, Orlumbus gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I can't help but admire you all the more, Luffy- Senpai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Digaga Gagaga!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Same here! 01, Bartolomeo! Let's get things started!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: There's no need for him to drink his parent portion anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You do have a point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's better if both sides just do what they feel is best.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Something tells me you're not the type of guy to prevent another from exercising his free will.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hm? Actually, you're right!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Luffy- Senpai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're pretty much just up and doing this on our own, but here goes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fire!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: That's orlumbus's yonta Maria Grand Fleet !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: People will Defini- Tely remember the name of the guy that sinks that Badboy!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Citizens of Dressrossa! Return to the mainland! It isn't safe here!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: But, if we don't stay here, Fujitora's gonna-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WhoAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Q A

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: On the enemy fleet!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: A PARTING GIFT, STRAW HAT.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Now then. Luffy- Senipai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We hereby swear to, at any time and Circum- stance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Become thy shield! or thy sword!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: As repayment for all thou hast done for us!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: We 7, with every fiber of our being, do hereby very selfishly take, with these cups of sake,

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Our vows to be your underlings!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hee Eeee Eey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: What the hell are you guys doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: OHH! Now we can openly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Is the banquet ready yet!? Hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING'S SET!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Time to celebrate the formation of the $600 strong Straw Hat grand fleet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Ufufu... they sure do as they please...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: UHAH! An underlying's vow? Who's ever even heard of such a thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Big Boss Straw Hat! We're looking forward to working under you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I haven't actually had a single drop, you_doofs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: And yet this thing is empty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Yep! And that's how it should be! You continue acting the way you always have.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: We've just selfishly pledged vows of fealty to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: And if anything ever happens, we'll come of our own accord to your aid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Wouldn't hurt to have a bunch of people under you that you have no responsibility towards now, would it?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: So, it would be a huge help if you at least took our names down and remembered our faces...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Luffy! Seems the main course is gonna be fighting fish steak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: That sounds. Friggin. Amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Leo! We're going to start the banquet after we've set sail; what are you tontatta gonna do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Oi, you can stop crying now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: No... I don't even think I can stand... I'm too over- wheelmed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: We'll take part in the banquet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: We'll just return on the yellow cub once it's over! Don't worry!

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
